title: Keyshard Injector
description: A simple yet efficient injector for SECRETS. Write Once Use Anywhere.

sections.Overview: Keyshard is a simple yet efficient injector for secrets, enabling write-once use anywhere.
sections.Usage: Integrate into your deployment pipeline to manage secret injection safely.

sections.Overview: Speech-to-Text application converting audio streams into transcribed text in real time.
sections.Features: Supports multiple languages, offline processing, and customizable vocabularies.

title: P2P File Sharing CLI
description: A P2P terminal based (TUI) file sharing CLI

sections.Overview: Peerpipe is a peer-to-peer file sharing CLI with a TUI for easy file transfer.
sections.Capabilities: Handles large files, resumable transfers, and end-to-end encryption.

title: Atomic UI Registry
description: The Atomic UI Registry for NextJS. 🪼

sections.Overview: Atomic UI Registry provides a centralized repository for reusable UI components in Next.js.
sections.Benefits: Promotes consistency, reduces duplication, and simplifies component discovery.

title: Reviewslop
description: A simple package to add minimal review button to your website.

sections.Overview: Reviewslop adds a minimal review button to capture feedback on any website.
sections.Integration: Simple script injection with customizable styling and callbacks.
